missing_location_class.note: loc_classfctn_desc field added in 2022; absence is expected for pre-2022 records

geocoding_quality.rule: Lat/lon shared by ≥3 incidents in a single precinct is treated as a stationhouse fallback. Some fallback rows have been recovered by matching to the NYPD Complaint dataset (see About → Methodology).

spatial_join.denominator_note: NYCHA and NTA membership computed on incidents with usable coordinates (original precise + recovered via complaint matching).
